hooks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/notify.ps1" -Title "Claude Task Done" -Message "Task completed. Waiting for your input."
pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/notify.ps1" -Title "Claude Needs Input" -Message "Claude is waiting for your confirmation."
